creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Created attachment 248670
Patch to update net/rabbitmq to 3.12.13

This patch will update net/rabbitmq to the latest version 3.12.13

This patch uses standard build approach as in the current port version 3.11.28

There are several prerequisites should be met before attempting an upgrade from 3.11.x to 3.12.x, check the upgrade notes at https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server/releases/tag/v3.12.0
